human_detail: Per-passenger subsidy hit $460 — more than double the $200 federal cap — and DOT pulled it.

last_carrier: Southern Airways Express (EAS); Allegiant retains leisure
human_detail: Sits within 70nm of Dulles, BWI and National — that proximity is exactly why DOT cut the subsidy; only a 2x-weekly Allegiant flight to Orlando remains.
Home of UGA, ~70 miles from Atlanta's hub; failed the 10-enplanements-per-day floor.
